Changed files (paths): market_data_feed.py, profit_calculator.py Patch summary (brief): Fixed MarketDataFeed to resolve chain id safely with settings fallback, and hardened ProfitCalculator to handle missing per-chain settings/chain id so profit analysis returns full metrics under minimal mocks. - Removed a startup crash in MarketDataFeed; made profit analysis resilient to stubbed web3/settings inputs.
